title: Clinic Assistant ( PSA)
description:
Job Description & Requirements

  • Office Hour, alternate Sat off
  • Monthly Insentive
  • Central Area

We are seeking a dedicated Clinic Assistant to support the smooth operation of our client. The role involves managing reception duties, providing administrative and clinical support, and ensuring excellent patient care. The ideal candidate will be patient-focused, organized, and able to work efficiently in a dynamic healthcare environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage reception duties including greeting patients, attending to enquiries, and handling phone calls professionally.
  • Perform front-desk tasks such as patient registration, appointment scheduling, verification of insurance, and billing processes.
  • Process insurance claims and Medisave transactions accurately and in a timely manner.
  • Maintain proper billing records and reconcile daily cash and electronic payments.
  • Assist doctors during consultations, ensuring patients’ comfort and needs are met.
  • Conduct regular stock-taking and replenishment of medical supplies.
  • Maintain a clean, safe, and organized clinic environment at all times.

Job Requirements

  • Fresh graduates are welcome. Training will be provided.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills with a patient-centric mindset.
  • Ability to multitask and remain efficient in a fast-paced environment.
  • Familiarity with Plato system and proficiency in basic computer applications (e.g., MS Office).
  • Positive work attitude, good team player, and willingness to learn.

Interested applicants, kindly furnish us with your detailed resume and email to recruitment@salo.sg or WA 88681573

** We regret to inform only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Applicants who do not possess necessary experience or qualification will still be considered on individual merits and may be contacted for other opportunities.

SALOHealth

EA Licence No.: 24C2535

postedCompany.description:
SALO is a nurse-led agency committed to delivering exceptional healthcare solutions across Singapore. Founded and operated by experienced nurses, we specialize in two core areas: full-time nurse recruitment for healthcare institutions and personalized homecare nursing services.

With our deep understanding of both the healthcare industry and the unique needs of patients at home, SALO is your trusted partner in providing top-tier nursing services for both healthcare facilities and private households.
postedCompany.name: SALOHEALTH MANAGEMENT PTE. LTD.
